title: justicia chapadensis
intro: Justicia chapadensis, also known as Chapada's Justicia or Brazilian Jacobinia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Justicia chapadensis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and relieving symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form.
